name: Cyber Avenger
short_description: Cyber Avenger is a top-down action game where you take on the role of a highly skilled covert operative on a dangerous mission to stop a group of terrorists. You must navigate through five maps, facing a variety of enemies, including shotgunners, snipers, melee fighters, kamikazes, and more.
detailed_description:
Cyber Avenger is a dynamic top-down shooter where you take on the role of an elite agent sent on a solo mission to eliminate a terrorist organization that has acquired cutting-edge teleportation technology. Use a deadly arsenal, fight your way through waves of dangerous enemies, and stop the threat before it’s too late.

Story

In the near future, a terrorist group raids a research facility and steals revolutionary technology — a portal network that allows instant travel between any point on Earth. This invention makes the organization extremely mobile and dangerous. When the government manages to locate one of their bases, it decides to strike immediately. Due to the classified nature of the operation, only a single operative — a professional special agent — is sent in. His mission: infiltrate enemy bases through the same portal network and eliminate them one by one before the world plunges into chaos.

Combat System

Battles in Cyber Avenger unfold in a fast-paced top-down shooter format, where you’ll need to keep moving, dodging, and making split-second decisions. Players have access to a variety of weapons: a pistol for precision shooting, an assault rifle for rapid engagements, a shotgun with devastating close-range power, a sniper rifle for long-range eliminations, and a grenade launcher for dealing with heavily armored targets. Enemy types are just as varied — from melee fighters and suicide bombers to foes with automatic weapons, mortar crews, and even mechs equipped with heavy machine guns. Each enemy requires a different strategy and the right choice of weapon. Intense firefights and constant motion make every encounter tense and unpredictable.

Progression & Levels

The game features six unique levels, each with its own visual style and gameplay elements. As you progress, you'll unlock new weapons, face increasingly challenging enemies, and delve deeper into the story. The game’s pacing steadily increases, pushing you to adapt to new threats and master every skill necessary for survival.

Key Features

  • A wide variety of weapons with distinct stats and tactical uses

  • Diverse enemy types that require different strategies

  • 6 uniquely designed levels with varying atmospheres

  • Engaging storyline with elements of science fiction

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Traditional Chinese, Simplified Chinese, Korean, Polish, Russian, Turkish, Czech, Japanese, Ukrainian, Portuguese - Portugal
